DisclosedMetricFamily: Pathloss/ToA error; MAE/RMSE-style map error; localization scores
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Transmitter split; environment split; sparse-sample setting; challenge scoring rule
ComparisonRule: Compare only under the same challenge version and split
Interpretation: Common 2D benchmark; gains may reflect raster conventions or local spatial correlation.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Sparse-measurement REM error; U-Net/CGAN baseline results
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Measurement sparsity; cross-area setting; RSRP generation; baseline configuration
ComparisonRule: Keep mask density area split and metric implementation fixed
Interpretation: Sparse-measurement performance remains bound to the stated mask and area split.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Multiband/3D reconstruction or generative fidelity metrics
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Frequency; terrain; altitude; climate/context labels; scenario separation
ComparisonRule: Report each band height and scenario partition separately
Interpretation: 3D coverage accuracy requires band and height context.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Volumetric pathloss-map error; image/volume fidelity; generative metrics
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: City split; 3D descriptor availability; receiver-height convention; dataset version
ComparisonRule: Use the same city split volume definition and data version
Interpretation: Volumetric maps expose low-altitude behavior within simulator and split limits.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Pathloss error; inference speed; parameter efficiency
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Indoor split; receiver-height variation; training size; model variant
ComparisonRule: Compare indoor results only with matched height and training-size settings
Interpretation: Height-aware indoor protocols require new evidence for outdoor UAV claims.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Multi-step future-map forecasting error; temporal metrics
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Forecast horizon; trajectory generation; temporal split; static or dynamic baseline
ComparisonRule: Keep horizon cadence temporal split and trajectory generator fixed
Interpretation: Forecasting metrics should be linked to map age and control utility.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Prediction metrics for gain delay angle and related layers
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Descriptor type; learning protocol; scenario split; environmental representation
ComparisonRule: Compare only the same channel descriptor and scenario partition
Interpretation: CKM scores do not share one scale with scalar pathloss-map RMSE.

DisclosedMetricFamily: MSE/MAE/PSNR under sparse 3D construction and zero-shot transfer
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Frequency; height; sample count; candidate count; model size; split; checkpoint provenance
ComparisonRule: Separate simulated and real-measurement protocols and disclose checkpoint provenance
Interpretation: The result card is useful while deployment claims still need uncertainty and task evidence.

DisclosedMetricFamily: RMSE on reserved RadioMap3DSeer competition protocol
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Reserved split; tensor RMSE; propagation features; ablation; metric script
ComparisonRule: Treat the reserved competition protocol as its own comparison line
Interpretation: Journal-backed evidence does not imply an open reproduction package.

DisclosedMetricFamily: RSRP RMSE; simulator mismatch; GPR sampling efficiency
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Measurement geometry; UAV heights; calibration; kernel; sampling mask
ComparisonRule: Compare only matched measurement geometry height planes and sampling masks
Interpretation: Real low-altitude evidence remains bounded by data and code availability.
